title: Simple Food Stuffs
description: Some random food items that think fit vanilla Minecraft, heavy inspiration from farmers delicacy
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11ccb7047b657a6df8f775b2e3d8c639967b2a2c.png)

### **Suh.**

This mod is **very simple**. any foods in this mod you will **encounter naturally through the recipe book** and **common sense**.

but for more explanation this mod currently adds stuff like **jams** that give you **buffs** on drinking, **sandwiches**... and nothing else yet. **if i feel like it** ill update it more, but for now its a simple QoL mod that adds more food. have fun?

### Jam effects :
- Sweetberry Jam : Speed II for 10s and Regeneration II for 3s
- Glowberry Jam : Night Vision and Glowing for 1 minute
- Carrot Sauce : Resistance II for 1 minute
- Apple Sauce : Regeneration for 10s and Haste for 1 minute

### Info :

You get jam using a **jammery** made stone and planks (of any types)  and to use it you need jars made from bronze and glass

Bronze is made by combining copper and iron and glowberries in a craftilng table.

you use the jammery by placing a jar in a slot and the food you want to jam in the other. (sweetberries, carrots, apples, glowberries)

And sandwiches are crafted using 2 pieces of bread and a meat (currently only chicken pork and beef) and lettuce. 
For the pork one you need cooked eggs which you get by smoking eggs, and combine them to make a bacon and eggs sandwich!

### New Vilager Trades :
You can now trade with farmer vilagers to get access to bounty coins, bounty apples, and lettuce
Bounty coins are used to trade with the farmer vilagers to get Jams, Bronze, Bounty apples, Lettuce.
Bounty apples are a higher tier of golden apple, which is on par with a God apple.
